results.title: 5 tools to create your ontologies - Lettria
results.description: Discover 5 essential tools to create your ontologies, including Lettria's Ontology Toolkit, to streamline ontology development and improve data organization.

results.title: Beyond the Hype: Building a Verifiable AI-Native SDLC | Ethyca | Ethyca
results.description: Learn how Ethyca doubled engineering throughput using Knowledge Graph Ontologies and TLA+ formal verification — moving beyond traditional RAG to a scalable, verifiable, AI-native development process.

results.title: 13 Best AI Workspace Tools 2026 (The Post-Notion Era)
results.description: The 13 best AI workspace tools of 2026. Taskade for AI-native workspaces, Notion AI for design, Mem for capture, Coda for docs. Post-Notion productivity stack.

results.title: Code On Time: Building the Enterprise Ontology for AI
results.description: Code On Time creates premium database apps straight from your database! A premium line-of-business app handles millions of records and presents data on any device via a universal user interface with responsive design. It displays data in forms, grids, lists, charts, maps, calendars, and spreadsheets. It sorts, filters, groups, and pivots online and offline data. Last but not least... It is built on time and does not cost a fortune to make!

results.title: What Is Ontology in AI? Enterprise Guide for 2026
results.description: An ontology in AI is a formal model that gives AI agents structured business context. Learn how enterprise ontologies reduce hallucination, power governance, and ground AI outputs.
